sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
# Find the purple square
for n in seg['nodes']:
    if n['color'] == 'p' and n['pixels'] == 9:
        print(f"Purple square: id={n['id']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")

# List all gray dots
gray_dots = [n for n in seg['nodes'] if n['pixels'] == 1 and n['color'] == 'G']
dots_sorted = sorted(gray_dots, key=lambda n: (n['boundary'][0][0], n['boundary'][0][1]))
print(f"\nGray dots: {len(dots_sorted)}")
for d in dots_sorted:
    print(f"  id={d['id']}, pos={d['boundary'][0]}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
